comments.ticket_summary: Implement the Betting Tips Hub Page
comments.author: Sanja Budic
comments.body: Completed, deployed to qa3. Note: Ticket work is only frontend, tips array is hardcoded, we are waiting on matrix team to create new endpoint for us /picks-with-odds — do we want to QA this now or do it after backend is connected?

comments.ticket_summary: Share/Create Imagery for the Learning Hub
comments.author: Ciara Carroll
comments.body: Hello both, please review the links below for the updated images for the Learning Hub. Each tile has been custom made in terms of imagery. I've gone with variable colors to make it vibrant. The slots image and the core images do have English text — if the plan is for this to be more global I can remove that text. @Mike Pett @Michael Butlin

comments.ticket_summary: Implement Fixes for Cool Tones Update

comments.body: QA Complete. Verified latest changes look good. I think that's all for the scope of this ticket. If any other random one is found I'll add to a separate ticket.
